title: illusion
body:
# Illusion  

The decoration mod provides a large number of blocks but they have no practical use. Various mods have utility blocks with differing textures, and ~~players may want more tools for pranking~~...

**Illusion** can help you solve these issues! This mod allows players to modify the rendering model of a [Blockentity](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Block_entity) while preserving the block's original function.

## Features

This mod adds three items: Illusion Crystal, Block State Tool, and Moving Tool.

**Illusion Crystal**: The core item. Hold the Illusion Crystal in the main hand and any block in the off-hand, then right-click the block entity to change its model. If the off-hand is empty, the block entity will revert to its original model.

**Movement Tool**: Right-clicking the air changes the movement axis. Right-clicking a transformed block entity moves its model along the positive direction of that axis, while sneaking and right-clicking moves it in the negative direction.

**Block State Tool**: Right-clicking a transformed block entity cycles through all block states of the rendering model, suitable for changing orientation, waterlogging status, etc.

## Mod Integration

This mod integrates with [Yuushya Modelling](https://modrinth.com/mod/yuushya-modelling). Holding a Show Block in the off-hand and using the Illusion Crystal can change the block entity to match the model style of the held Show Block.

## Compatibility

This mod is compatible with Indigo Renderer and can run safely when [Synya Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) is installed.


![Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pr6OJTek/images/54a849129739fd9b4b2b27833fe3a79d7353023c.png)
